This is believed to be fixed with r215295 (sys/opencrypto/cryptosoft.c rev. 
1.27), in head r215600 (sys/opencrypto/cryptosoft.c rev. 1.23.2.5) in stable/8 
and r215601 (sys/opencrypto/cryptosoft.c rev. 1.19.2.4) in stable/7. Could 
you please give on of these a try?
